dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your work to {quest_action} has stirred up a hornet's nest. {quest_threat_animate_The} {quest_threat_animate_is} aware someone is coming for them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They sent {enemy_type_plural} to strike at {quest_stakes_the} as a warning. {quest_ally} fended them off, but they hit hard. They are massing {location_hint} near {quest_focus_the}. We cannot let this go unanswered.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every day they draw breath is an insult to the ones we lost. Finish it.

dialogueChunks.intro: Your pursuit to {quest_action} flushed them out, {player_name}. But {quest_threat_animate_the} scattered and regrouped closer to {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type_plural} are dug in deep {location_hint}. They are using {quest_focus_the} as a strongpoint. We need to root them out before they can retaliate against {quest_stakes_the} again.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are close. One more push and this will be over.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the situation has shifted. Since you started to {quest_action}, {quest_threat_animate_the} retaliated by targeting our people.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They struck near {quest_focus_the} and the {enemy_type_plural} are blocking the routes {location_hint}. {quest_ally} is rallying the community, but they need a fighter. Cut through them and end this before more of our kin are lost.
dialogueChunks.outro: Our kin deserve better than to be terrorized. End this threat for good.
